name: Information Security Policies
recommendation: Policy must be approved, versioned, and reviewed annually.

name: User Access Management
recommendation: Review access quarterly. Revoke leavers. Enforce MFA on privileged accounts.

name: Logging and Monitoring
recommendation: Maintain audit logs for at least 90 days with complete timestamps.

name: Risk Assessment and Treatment
recommendation: All risks must have a named owner and an approved treatment plan.

name: Logical and Physical Access Controls
recommendation: Restrict system access to authorised users only. Review quarterly.

name: System Monitoring
recommendation: Monitor system components for anomalies and security events.

name: Risk Assessment Process
recommendation: Maintain a risk register with named owners and treatment plans.

name: Security of Processing
recommendation: Document encryption, pseudonymisation and access control measures.

name: Records of Processing Activities
recommendation: Maintain records of all processing activities with timestamps.
